children.heading: Creation of Trust Fund
children.label: a Creation of Trust Fund
children.text: There is established in the Treasury of the United States a trust fund to be known as the “Agricultural Disaster Relief Trust Fund”, consisting of such amounts as may be appropriated or credited to such Trust Fund as provided in this section.

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: There are appropriated to the Agricultural Disaster Relief Trust Fund amounts equivalent to 3.08 percent of the amounts received in the general fund of the Treasury of the United States during fiscal years 2008 through 2011 attributable to the duties collected on articles entered, or withdrawn from warehouse, for consumption under the Harmonized Tariff Schedule of the United States.

children.heading: Amounts based on estimates
children.label: 2 Amounts based on estimates
children.text: The amounts appropriated under this section shall be transferred at least monthly from the general fund of the Treasury of the United States to the Agricultural Disaster Relief Trust Fund on the basis of estimates made by the Secretary of the Treasury. Proper adjustments shall be made in the amounts subsequently transferred to the extent prior estimates were in excess of or less than the amounts required to be transferred.

children.heading: Limitation on transfers to Agricultural Disaster Relief Trust Fund
children.label: 3 Limitation on transfers to Agricultural Disaster Relief Trust Fund
A
children.text: any provision of law which is not contained or referenced in this subchapter or in a revenue Act, and

children.label: B
children.text: whether such provision of law is a subsequently enacted provision or directly or indirectly seeks to waive the application of this paragraph.

children.heading: Reports
children.label: 1 Reports
children.text: The Secretary of the Treasury shall be the trustee of the Agricultural Disaster Relief Trust Fund and shall submit an annual report to Congress each year on the financial condition and the results of the operations of such Trust Fund during the preceding fiscal year and on its expected condition and operations during the 4 fiscal years succeeding such fiscal year. Such report shall be printed as a House document of the session of Congress to which the report is made.

children.label: i
children.text: on original issue at the issue price, or

children.label: ii
children.text: by purchase of outstanding obligations at the market price.

children.heading: Sale of obligations
children.label: B Sale of obligations
children.text: Any obligation acquired by the Agricultural Disaster Relief Trust Fund may be sold by the Secretary of the Treasury at the market price.

children.heading: Interest on certain proceeds
children.label: C Interest on certain proceeds
children.text: The interest on, and the proceeds from the sale or redemption of, any obligations held in the Agricultural Disaster Relief Trust Fund shall be credited to and form a part of such Trust Fund.

children.heading: Expenditures from Trust Fund
children.label: d Expenditures from Trust Fund
children.text: Amounts in the Agricultural Disaster Relief Trust Fund shall be available for the purposes of making expenditures to meet those obligations of the United States incurred under or (as such sections are in effect on the date of the enactment of the Food, Conservation, and Energy Act of 2008).section 2497 of this titlesection 1531 of title 7

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: There are authorized to be appropriated, and are appropriated, to the Agricultural Disaster Relief Trust Fund, as repayable advances, such sums as may be necessary to carry out the purposes of such Trust Fund.

children.heading: In general
children.label: A In general
children.text: Advances made to the Agricultural Disaster Relief Trust Fund shall be repaid, and interest on such advances shall be paid, to the general fund of the Treasury when the Secretary determines that moneys are available for such purposes in such Trust Fund.

children.label: i
children.text: at a rate determined by the Secretary of the Treasury (as of the close of the calendar month preceding the month in which the advance is made) to be equal to the current average market yield on outstanding marketable obligations of the United States with remaining periods to maturity comparable to the anticipated period during which the advance will be outstanding, and
